title: Log in and reach account overview
description: Verifies an existing user can log in with valid credentials and lands on the account overview page.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Verify the user lands on the account overview

title: Superadmin login lands in control center
description: Superadmin can log in via the superadmin login page and land in the superadmin control center.

steps.description: Navigate to /superadmin-login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Verify the user lands in the superadmin control center

title: Register a new user and start onboarding
description: Verifies a new user can register and is redirected into onboarding step 1.

steps.description: Navigate to /register
Fill Test User into the name field
Fill a unique email into the email field
Fill a valid password into the password field
Submit the registration form
Verify the user lands on onboarding step 1

title: Finish onboarding and land on account overview
description: Verifies an authenticated user can finish onboarding and is redirected to the account overview.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the link to open onboarding
Navigate through onboarding until step 3 is displayed
Finish onboarding
Verify the user lands on the account overview

title: Access agency dashboard
description: Agency user can log in and view the agency dashboard successfully.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click to open the agency area
Verify the agency dashboard summary is displayed

title: Complete step 1 to proceed to property setup
description: Verifies an authenticated user can complete onboarding step 1 and continue to step 2.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the link to open onboarding
Fill a valid tenant or agency name into the name field
Continue to the next onboarding step
Verify the user lands on onboarding step 2

title: Create a new account-level property
description: Verifies that an authenticated user can create a new property and then sees it listed in the account properties list.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation item to open the account properties page
Click the action to create a new property
Fill "Automation Property 1" into the property name field
Select a valid property type
Fill a valid address into the address field
Submit the property form
Verify a property named "Automation Property 1" appears in the properties list

title: Browse tenants list from superadmin
description: Superadmin can open the tenants list and see tenants displayed.

steps.description: Navigate to /superadmin-login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click to open the superadmin clients section
Verify a list of tenants is displayed

title: Complete property basics to proceed to final step
description: Verifies an authenticated user can complete onboarding property basics and continue to step 3.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the link to open onboarding
Navigate through onboarding until step 2 is displayed
Fill a valid property name into the property name field
Select a valid property type
Fill a valid address into the address fields
Continue to the next onboarding step
Verify the user lands on onboarding step 3

title: View account overview summary
description: Verifies that an authenticated user can view their account overview and see account summary content load successfully.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation item to open the account overview
Verify the account overview summary content is displayed

title: View agency clients list
description: Agency user can navigate to the clients area and see the list of client tenants.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click to open the agency area
Click to open the agency clients section
Verify a list of client tenants is displayed

title: View properties list
description: Verifies that an authenticated user can view the account-level properties list page and see properties content or an empty state.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation item to open the account properties page
Verify the properties list or an empty state is displayed

title: Invite a team member with a role
description: Verifies that an authenticated user can invite a team member by email with a selected role and sees the invite shown as pending.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation item to open the team management page
Fill "invitee+automation@example.com" into the invite email field
Select a role for the invited member
Submit the invite
Verify the invited member appears in a pending or invited state in the team list

title: View superadmin billing summary
description: Superadmin can navigate to the billing area and view platform-level billing summary information.

steps.description: Navigate to /superadmin-login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click to open the platform billing area
Verify platform billing summary information is displayed

title: Update profile information
description: Verifies that an authenticated user can update profile details and sees the updated profile information after saving.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation item to open the profile page
Fill "Test User Updated" into the full name field
Save changes
Verify the updated full name is displayed on the profile page

title: Update agency settings
description: Agency user can update agency-level settings and see a confirmation that changes were saved.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click to open the agency area
Click to open agency settings
Fill Agency QA Name into the agency name field
Submit the settings form
Verify a save confirmation is visible

title: View team member list
description: Verifies that an authenticated user can open the team management page and see the team list content load successfully.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation item to open the team management page
Verify the team members list is displayed

title: Browse agencies list from superadmin
description: Superadmin can open the agencies list and see agencies displayed.

steps.description: Navigate to /superadmin-login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click to open the superadmin agencies section
Verify a list of agencies is displayed

title: Update business information
description: Verifies that an authenticated user can update business information and sees a success confirmation after saving.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation item to open the business information page
Fill "Test business description updated" into the business description field
Save changes
Verify a success confirmation is visible

title: View superadmin system health dashboard
description: Superadmin can navigate to system health and view system status and audit summary information.

steps.description: Navigate to /superadmin-login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click to open the system health area
Verify system health information is displayed

title: Save agency integration settings
description: Agency user can add or edit agency-scoped integration settings and see an integration status after saving.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click to open the agency area
Click to open agency settings
Click to open agency integrations settings
Fill a valid-looking value into an integration credential field
Submit the integration settings form
Verify an integration status indicator is displayed

title: Change and save user preferences
description: Verifies that an authenticated user can change a preference and sees that the preference is applied after saving.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation item to open the preferences page
Select a different locale from the locale selector
Save changes
Verify the selected locale remains set after saving

title: Change an existing member role
description: Verifies that an authenticated user can change a team member role and sees the updated role reflected in the list.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation item to open the team management page
Select an existing team member from the list
Select a different role for the selected member
Save changes
Verify the member’s role is updated in the team list

title: Agency navigation persists within agency area
description: Agency user can move between agency dashboard and settings without leaving the agency context.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click to open the agency area
Click to open agency settings
Click to return to the agency dashboard
Verify the agency dashboard summary is displayed

title: Reject invalid email format on login
description: Verifies the login form blocks submission when the email format is invalid and shows an email validation error.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill invalid-email-format into the email field
Fill any-password into the password field
Submit the login form
Verify an email validation error is visible

title: Validate team invite email format
description: Verifies that inviting a team member with an invalid email shows a validation error and does not create an invite.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation item to open the team management page
Fill "not-an-email" into the invite email field
Select a role for the invited member
Submit the invite
Verify an email validation error is visible
